name: HMS HDML 1076 (ML 1076)
events: 15 Jun 1943 Argo conducted A/S exercises off Freetown with HMHDML 1076, HMHDML 1089, HMHDML 1137 and HMHDML 1147. (1)
18 Jun 1943 Argo conducted A/S exercises off Freetown with HMML 261, HMML 263, HMHDML 1076 and HMHDML 1209. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
